bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Lowering minTradeAdvantage to engage more frequently as we are currently too passive. Reducing kiteRangeBias and threatAversion slightly to prevent over-retreating, which allows opponents to dictate the pace and close gaps too easily.

lessons: GhostProtocol (bow) is our primary threat; avoid direct long-range duels.
Lancer (spear) consistently punishes us in melee; maintain maximum distance.
Sword-wielding bots are our most reliable targets; prioritize them when isolated.
Dagger users are closing gaps effectively; prioritize kiting and repositioning.
Prioritize mobility during hazard_storm rounds to avoid being pinned by spear or bow fire.
Our bow performance is stable against sword users but weak against mirror bow matchups.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: The bow remains our most consistent weapon for maintaining distance against melee-heavy opponents like sword and dagger users.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Reducing kiteRangeBias slightly to maintain better pressure while keeping minTradeAdvantage high to avoid losing trades to melee gap-closers. Increasing targetThreatAversion to prioritize survival against high-threat melee bots.

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Slightly reducing kiteRangeBias to maintain better pressure against staff users, while lowering minTradeAdvantage and idleHealBelowHpFraction to engage more frequently and avoid being cornered by grapplers.

lessons: Valkyrie (spear) is the primary threat; maintain maximum distance and avoid open sightlines.
Warden (sword) is successfully closing distance; prioritize kiting and backpedaling.
Bow remains effective against sword-wielding bots; exploit their lack of range.
Avoid engaging NeuralReaper in mirror bow duels; prioritize easier targets.
Scorpion (grapple) is a high-risk threat; maintain constant movement to avoid pull mechanics.
Maintain balanced posture to preserve mobility against spear and grapple users.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: The bow remains our most consistent weapon for kiting melee-focused opponents like swords and shields.

lessons: Sword users remain our primary source of kills; continue kiting them at maximum range.
Grapple users (Scorpion, Hook) are lethal in hazard storms; prioritize breaking line-of-sight when they are nearby.
Archmage (staff) consistently punishes us; maintain distance and avoid extended trades against staff users.
Bow is highly effective against shield users; exploit their lack of mobility to chip them down.
Avoid direct bow-on-bow engagements; prioritize targets distracted by other combatants.
In fast zone rounds, prioritize positioning over aggression to avoid being cornered by melee bots.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: The bow continues to provide consistent performance across diverse matchups and modifiers.
